name: canshare-who-haematology-mpn-other-histology
title: NZ WHO haematolymphoid myeloproliferative neoplasm other leukaemia histology
description: Histologies used for myeloproliferative neoplasm which are not primary myelofibrosis, essential thrombocythemia, polycythemia vera, chronic myeloid leukaemia, chronic eosinophilic leukaemia, juvenile myelomonocytic leukaemia,   (WHO Classification of Tumours, Haematolymphoid Tumours) or an 'Other' value.
